summary: New `digest` command (internal/cli/digest.go): pulls topic-matched items from pp_dataset_items, dedupes by URL + title-similarity hash, ranks by engagement+recency+novelty, and fills a Go text/template. Built-in templates default and tiktok-script; --template-file accepts a user template. --offline is always-local (no API). --json emits the structured ranked items.
rationale: Newsletter-ready markdown rendering on top of the local normalized store; nothing in the Apify stack does this.
